_comment: Per-SKU RDMA fabric selectors for scale-out (EP16 multi-node) legs, overlaid onto the base operator config by config.py operator-config. Applied only when collx_apply_network_profile runs for scale-out (EP8/MNNVL return early). Each runners.<sku> block may contain only the network FIELDS: socket_ifname, rdma_devices, ib_gid_index, rdma_service_level, rdma_traffic_class. SKUs absent here fall back to the network overlay secret.
